entries.description: Connect the Docker MCP Toolkit to a client. Supported clients: claude-code claude-desktop cline codex continue crush cursor gemini goose gordon kiro lmstudio opencode sema4 vscode zed

entries.description: Create a new profile of MCP servers

entries.description: Add MCP servers to a profile
officialExamples: docker mcp profile server add my-profile --server myorg/server:v1

entries.description: Remove MCP servers from a profile
officialExamples: docker mcp profile server remove my-profile --name my-server

entries.description: Manage tool allowlist for servers in a profile
officialExamples: docker mcp profile tools my-profile --enable server1:docker-ps --disable server1:docker-rm
